privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: GrandCafe Cheers ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Spanish data protection law (LOPD-GDD).
privacy.controllerText: GrandCafe Cheers S.L., NIF B12345678, Passeig Marítim 1, 07014 Palma de Mallorca, Illes Balears, Spain. Email: privacy@cheersmallorca.com
privacy.dataCollectedText: We collect the following categories of personal data:
dataItems: Contact data: email address, phone number
Booking data: reservation date, party size, occasion, special requests
Communication preferences: language, newsletter opt-in status
Technical data: IP address, browser type, cookies (see Cookie Policy)
Financial data: payment method details (processed by Stripe; we do not store card numbers)

purposes.basis: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR) — you may withdraw at any time

purposes.purpose: Comply with Spanish tax and accounting obligations

privacy.retentionText: We retain personal data for the following periods:
retentionItems: Booking data: 3 years from the date of reservation
Customer accounts: as long as the account is active, plus 2 years
Newsletter subscriber data: until you unsubscribe, plus 1 year
Financial/invoice data: 10 years (Spanish tax law — General Tributaria)
Employee data: duration of employment plus 5 years
privacy.processorsText: We share personal data with the following processors under data processing agreements:
privacy.rightsText: Under GDPR and LOPD-GDD you have the right to:
rights: Erase your data — 'right to be forgotten' (Art. 17 GDPR)
Object to processing based on legitimate interests (Art. 21 GDPR)
Withdraw consent at any time (Art. 7(3) GDPR)
Lodge a complaint with the AEPD (Agencia Española de Protección de Datos) at aepd.es
privacy.rightsContact: To exercise your rights, contact us at: privacy@cheersmallorca.com
privacy.cookiesText: We use cookies as described in our Cookie Policy.
privacy.contactText: For any privacy-related queries, contact our Data Protection contact point at privacy@cheersmallorca.com or by post at the address above.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains what cookies we use on our website, why we use them, and how you can control them. This policy applies to grandcafe-cheers-app.vercel.app and any associated subdomains.
cookies.whatText: Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit a website. They allow the site to remember your actions and preferences over a period of time.

necessary.title: Strictly Necessary Cookies
necessary.description: These cookies are required for the website to function and cannot be switched off.

items.name: sb-*-auth-token-code-verifier
items.purpose: PKCE code verifier for OAuth flows

items.name: NEXT_LOCALE
items.purpose: Stores your language preference (en, nl, es, de)

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.description: These cookies enable enhanced functionality but are not strictly required.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.description: These cookies are set by third-party services embedded on our site.

cookies.noAnalytics: We currently do not use analytics cookies (e.g. Google Analytics). If this changes, we will update this policy and request your consent.
cookies.controlText: You can manage your cookie preferences using our consent banner at the bottom of the page. You can also control cookies through your browser settings. Note that blocking strictly necessary cookies will affect the functionality of our website.
cookies.moreInfoText: For more information about cookies and how to manage them, visit allaboutcookies.org.

avisoLegal.title: Legal Notice (Aviso Legal)
avisoLegal.subtitle: Information required by LSSI-CE Art. 10

values.address: Passeig Marítim 1, 07014 Palma de Mallorca, Illes Balears, Spain
values.registroMercantil: Registro Mercantil de Mallorca, Tomo 1234, Folio 56, Hoja PM-00000

avisoLegal.activityText: GrandCafe Cheers S.L. operates a bar and restaurant venue. Services offered include table reservations, food and beverage service, events, and related hospitality services.
avisoLegal.supervisoryText: As a food and beverage establishment, GrandCafe Cheers is regulated by the Conselleria de Turisme i Esports del Govern de les Illes Balears and must comply with Balearic hospitality licensing requirements.
avisoLegal.intellectualText: All content on this website, including text, images, logos, and software, is the property of GrandCafe Cheers S.L. or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws. Reproduction without prior written consent is prohibited.
avisoLegal.liabilityText: GrandCafe Cheers S.L. is not liable for any damages arising from the use of this website or its content. We make reasonable efforts to keep information accurate and up to date but cannot guarantee the completeness or accuracy of all content.
avisoLegal.lawText: This Legal Notice is governed by Spanish law. Any disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the courts of Palma de Mallorca, Spain.

cookieConsent.message: We use cookies to provide essential functionality and improve your experience.
cookieConsent.necessaryDesc: Required for the website to function correctly. Cannot be disabled.
cookieConsent.functionalDesc: Remembers your preferences such as theme and language.
cookieConsent.marketingDesc: Used to track and personalise advertising. Currently not in use.

privacyCheckbox.label: I have read and accept the
privacyCheckbox.required: You must accept the privacy policy to continue.
